General.Name: aap Implantate AG
General.Description: aap Implantate AG develops, manufactures, and markets traumatology products for orthopedics in Germany and internationally. The company offers LOQTEQ, an anatomical plating system for the treatment of ankle, straight plates, knee, elbow, wrist, and shoulder. It also provides hole screws and Repro Bone materials. The company sells its products directly to hospitals, purchasing groups, and hospital groups through a network of distributors. aap Implantate AG was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Berlin, Germany.
